description: Remove all children of the provided Instance (Slot).

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call to destroy the children slots of Instance (Slot)
fields.Instance: The slot to destroy all the children for.
fields.PreserveAssets: Whether or not the assets associated with the children of the provided Instance (Slot) should stay or be instantly discarded
fields.SendDestroyingEvent: Whether or not to send a destroying event of the children slots to other nodes like On Destroying
fields.Next: Sends an Impulse after * (Call) is called and Instance (Slot)'s children has been destroyed. will not fire if Instance (Slot) is null.
